# CHOOSE
Given competing options with tradeoffs (cost vs. performance, risk vs. return), which combination is actually best for your objectives?
![](https://strangeworks.com/images/use-cases/icon-tough.svg)
## Why it's Tough
You're rarely optimizing one thing. You're balancing multiple objectives that conflict. And you're not picking one option; you're picking a portfolio of options that work together. The tradeoff space is multidimensional and non-intuitive.
![](https://strangeworks.com/images/use-cases/icon-strangeworks.svg)
## Our Approach
We formulate these as multi-objective optimization problems and find the Pareto frontier: the set of solutions where you can't improve one objective without sacrificing another. You see the real tradeoffs and make informed decisions instead of guessing.
TECHNICAL COMPETENCIES & KEYWORDS
portfolio optimizationproduct mixpricingconfigurationselectionknapsackmulti-objectivePareto frontierrobust optimizationstochastic optimization
USE CASES FOR CHOOSE
## 6 EXAMPLES
#### [Portfolio  
Management Optimize asset allocation to maximize risk-adjusted returns while satisfying regulatory constraints, ESG criteria, and transaction cost considerations in financial portfolios. ](https://strangeworks.com/use-cases/choose/portfolio-management)
#### [Inventory Management and  
Stock Control Determine optimal stocking levels for parts and materials across multi-echelon networks while balancing service levels against carrying costs, managing obsolescence risk, and adapting to demand variability. ](https://strangeworks.com/use-cases/choose/inventory-management)
#### [Defense Supply Chain  
and Resource Allocation Optimize multi-tier defense supply chains and tactical resource allocation across distributed operations, managing 200,000+ suppliers while maximizing readiness and minimizing costs in contested environments. ](https://strangeworks.com/use-cases/choose/defense-supply-chain-allocation)
#### [Space Utilization and  
Layout Optimization Optimize manufacturing facility layouts and warehouse space allocation to minimize material handling costs while maximizing productive floor area utilization. ](https://strangeworks.com/use-cases/choose/space-utilization)
#### [Energy Portfolio  
Optimization Determine the optimal long-term mix of thermal, renewable, and storage assets to minimize cost while meeting reliability and emissions targets over 10-30 year planning horizons. ](https://strangeworks.com/use-cases/choose/energy-portfolio-optimization)
#### [Strategic Network  
Planning Optimize long-term infrastructure investments for energy transmission and distribution networks to support renewable integration, manage demand growth, and maintain reliability while minimizing capital expenditures. ](https://strangeworks.com/use-cases/choose/strategic-network-planning)
![](https://strangeworks.com/images/global/footer-xray.png)

You're rarely optimizing one thing. You're balancing multiple objectives that conflict. And you're not picking one option; you're picking a portfolio of options that work together. The tradeoff space is multidimensional and non-intuitive.

Our Approach

We formulate these as multi-objective optimization problems and find the Pareto frontier: the set of solutions where you can't improve one objective without sacrificing another. You see the real tradeoffs and make informed decisions instead of guessing.

Portfolio
Management

Optimize asset allocation to maximize risk-adjusted returns while satisfying regulatory constraints, ESG criteria, and transaction cost considerations in financial portfolios.

Inventory Management and
Stock Control

Determine optimal stocking levels for parts and materials across multi-echelon networks while balancing service levels against carrying costs, managing obsolescence risk, and adapting to demand variability.

Defense Supply Chain
and Resource Allocation

Optimize multi-tier defense supply chains and tactical resource allocation across distributed operations, managing 200,000+ suppliers while maximizing readiness and minimizing costs in contested environments.

Space Utilization and
Layout Optimization

Optimize manufacturing facility layouts and warehouse space allocation to minimize material handling costs while maximizing productive floor area utilization.

Energy Portfolio
Optimization

Determine the optimal long-term mix of thermal, renewable, and storage assets to minimize cost while meeting reliability and emissions targets over 10-30 year planning horizons.

Strategic Network
Planning

Optimize long-term infrastructure investments for energy transmission and distribution networks to support renewable integration, manage demand growth, and maintain reliability while minimizing capital expenditures.
